description: Six mandatory BSH envelope fields. Exact names, types and validation. Freeze in hour 1.

fields.label: Usage Type
fields.note: MUST be 'residential'. If 'commercial' → end call immediately, do not create offer.
fields.extract_prompt: Is the kitchen usage residential (in-unit apartment kitchens, shared kitchens for residents) or commercial (catering, central kitchen for staff)?

fields.label: Facility Type
fields.extract_prompt: What type of senior-living or care facility is this? (e.g. full in-patient care, assisted living, dementia ward)

fields.label: Number of Residential Units
fields.extract_prompt: How many residential units or apartments does the facility have?

fields.label: Decision / Installation Timeline
fields.extract_prompt: When is the facility planning to make the purchasing decision or have new appliances installed?

fields.label: Budget Range (monthly lease, EUR)
fields.extract_prompt: Does the facility have a rough monthly budget in mind for kitchen appliance rental? Even a ballpark helps.

fields.label: Decision Maker Name & Role
fields.extract_prompt: Who is the person who will ultimately sign off on this purchase — their name and role?

note: Completeness = filled_required_fields / total_required_fields. Otto requires ≥ 0.8 to generate draft.
